title: EatMob
description: Pick up mobs and (optionally) consume them
body:
With this mod, you can pick up any mob and (optionally) consume them, or place them back down.

![Eating a Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b2306967df84ce5e55e6e87ae504092b3ca9a2b.gif)

- You must have an empty hand to pick up a mob. 
- Entities will retain their names and variants through being picked up, but not their other entity data (e.g. if it is a baby.)
